name: bee-logical
description: Bee-Logical company plugin marketplace — reusable AI-driven SDLC framework for all projects.

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: AI-driven SDLC orchestrator: reads work items (Jira/ADO/markdown), routes them through requirements, planning, implementation, review, QA and PR — end to end.

plugins.name: sdlc-stack-web
plugins.description: Default web stack expertise for the SDLC pipeline: TypeScript standards, Next.js, NestJS, Postgres, MongoDB, DB migrations, Docker, API design.
